name: Food & Restaurant
description: Restaurants, food brands, culinary creators, food delivery

tone_rules.statement: Write with warmth and sensory richness — make people taste the words
Use evocative, specific language: not 'good pasta' but 'handmade tagliatelle with 48-hour ragù'
Balance passion with approachability — speak like a knowledgeable friend, not a Michelin critic
Be authentic about provenance and process — people want the story behind the dish

principles.statement: Every post should make the reader hungry or curious — or both
Share the craft: recipes, techniques, supplier stories, kitchen moments
Celebrate the people behind the food — chefs, farmers, producers
Seasonality and locality are values, not just trends — reflect them consistently

gold_examples.statement: This carbonara has three ingredients and zero cream. The creaminess comes from patience and technique.
Our tomatoes travel 12 kilometers from farm to plate. That's not a marketing claim — it's our sourcing policy.

discard_examples.statement: Come in and enjoy our wide selection of delicious food items at competitive prices!
We are passionate about providing an unforgettable dining experience for the whole family.
